Our Story

A garden in the sky

Perched on the 5th floor of Adited House in Ravindra Nagar, HighGarden Café was born from a simple dream — to create a space where the city's chaos melts away beneath a canopy of green.

We believe great food and good company deserve a beautiful backdrop. Our walls are adorned with living plants, our lights glow warm as dusk, and our kitchen crafts every dish with care.

Whether you're here to watch the match, lose yourself in a book, sip on our craft beverages, or simply breathe — HighGarden is your rooftop retreat in Indore.

2024
Est. Indore
Crafted With Care

"Visited recently with friends and had an absolutely wonderful experience. The ambience is beautifully designed with greenery, warm lights, and a cozy setup — perfect to relax, watch a match, or just unwind."
Kuldeep Tetwal
4 months ago
★★★★★
"10/10, must visit! The ambience was just over the top — such great setup and service. They had amazing books by the table which made me fall in love. The coffee was great, both in taste and look!"
Shubhagata Sharma
1 month ago
★★★★
"Place is good with nice vibes. Food and service is also good. Budget friendly prices make it a great place to hang out with friends after a long day. The rooftop greenery truly justifies the name."
